title: Batch 32 Mechanism-Specific Prediction Freeze
scientificQuestion: Can frozen mechanism predictions distinguish overlap, duplicate transfer, class-metric effects, ambiguity, model sensitivity, replay instability, and ordinary protocol difficulty?
domain: theory-guided protocol and leakage mechanism trials
limitations: Batch 32 freezes predictions only; main execution is deferred to Batch 33.
Predictions are bounded computational claims, not official benchmark claims.
Mechanism labels are hypotheses and are not treated as confirmed.
